name: Perimeter wall with windows
description: Solid perimeter wall around an AABB with regularly spaced window openings (every 4 blocks, 2 blocks tall), a stone foundation course at the base, and a slab cornice at the top. Interior is left empty so other skills can populate it.

required_furniture.rule: Primary perimeter material covers all four faces.
Glass-pane openings spaced every 4 blocks along each wall, 2 blocks tall, above the foundation course.
Alias of 'window'; each opening uses minecraft:glass_pane.
Stone (@secondary) course at y0 around the full perimeter.
Slab (@slab) course at y_top-1 around the full perimeter.

placement_rules: Windows on opposite walls for cross-light
lighting_ventilation: Glass-pane windows on all four walls every 4 blocks deliver cross-ventilation and natural light from at least two sides of every interior cell.

medieval.notes: Timber walls on cobblestone footing; oak-slab cornice.

modern.notes: Smooth-quartz curtain wall with stone-slab parapet.

fantasy.notes: Dark timber on mossy cobble with purpur cornice and stained-glass windows.

python_skill_signature: build(aabb: AABB, materials: Materials, style: str, **kwargs) -> list[Op]
